DASHBOARD.TITLE: HR Portal
DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Hello {{name}}, here is the status of your workforce today.

LIST.TITLE: Recruitment Tracking
LIST.SUBTITLE: Manage recruitment and application tracking
LIST.EMPTY: No candidates found. Adjust your filters or add a new candidate.

HISTORY.TITLE: Decision history
HISTORY.SUB: Click a candidate to see their history

WORKFLOW.TITLE: Workflow Automation
WORKFLOW.EMAIL_ACTION: Action: MS365 account creation + hardware provisioning.
WORKFLOW.FOOTER: Each 'Accepted' validation automatically generates an IT notification and creates a provisioning file.

PIPELINE_RH.TITLE: HR Pipeline
PIPELINE_RH.SUBTITLE: Real-time tracking of applications and recruitment stages.
PIPELINE_RH.TRY_ADJUST: Try adjusting your filters or add a new candidate.

NOTICE.ONLY_PENDING_ACCEPT: Only « Pending » candidates can be accepted.
NOTICE.ONLY_PENDING_REJECT: Only « Pending » candidates can be rejected.
NOTICE.IT_DEDICATED: IT provisioning (account creation) is done on the dedicated page.
NOTICE.ACCEPT_FIRST: Accept the candidate first to start IT provisioning.
NOTICE.HIRE_FLOW: The candidate must go through IT provisioning then onboarding before being hired.

DETAIL.NO_CV_HINT: No CV — PDF, DOC, DOCX (max 10 MB)

DETAIL_ERRORS.END_DATE_REQUIRED: The end date is required for this contract type.
DETAIL_ERRORS.CV_FORMAT: Unsupported format — PDF, DOC or DOCX only

REJECT.TITLE: Reject the candidate
REJECT.ERR_MIN: The reason must be at least 10 characters.
REJECT.ERR: Error while rejecting. Please try again.

INTERVIEWS.TITLE: Interviews
INTERVIEWS.NO_TYPES: No active interview type available. Configure them in Administration.
INTERVIEWS.EMPTY: No interview scheduled for this candidate.

OFFER.TITLE: Offer & Negotiation
OFFER.NONE_READY: No offer sent — the candidate is ready to receive one.
OFFER.NOT_YET: The offer can be sent once the candidate is accepted after the interviews.

FORM.TITLE: Create a candidate profile
FORM.CV_HINT: PDF, DOC or DOCX — max 5 MB
FORM.NOTES_PH: Add observations about the candidate, their strengths or particular expectations…
FORM.STEP2_SUB: Target position, contract type and assignment
FORM.STEP1_ERR: Please provide the first name, last name and a valid professional email.
FORM.STEP2_ERR: Please select a contract type and a start date.
FORM.QUALITY_HINT: By completing all sections, you increase the candidate's visibility for managers.
FORM.ERR_REQUIRED_STAR: Please fill in all required fields (marked *).
FORM.ERR_CV_AFTER_SAVE: Candidate saved, but the CV upload failed. Try again from the profile.

PIPELINE.TITLE: Candidates
PIPELINE.SUBTITLE: Real-time tracking of active hiring processes.

NOTICE.ACCEPTED: Offer accepted — {{name}} moves to IT provisioning.

REASON.CREATION_POSTE_DESC: New position created to meet an organizational need

FORM.TITLE: Create a new employee
